preface.title: Introduction
preface.para: This is &book_description; for OpenPhorum version 5.2.x and up. It is not intended for use with older versions of OpenPhorum, although a lot of information will apply.

Please keep in mind that this manual is neither complete, nor final. If you have any remarks about it, please let us know in the development forum on our website. With your contribution, we hope to make this manual a useful tool for OpenPhorum users in understanding and working with our software.
